expectations.evidence: CSS root defines multiple Anthropic palette hex values: --clay: #D97757, --sky: #5B9BD5, --cactus: #4A7A6F, --ivory: #FAF7F2, --slate: #3B3B3B. The hex #D97757 (clay), #5B9BD5 (sky), #4A7A6F (cactus), #FAF7F2 (ivory) and #3B3B3B (slate) match the required Anthropic palette.

Font stack uses 'Inter' and 'Source Serif 4' from Google Fonts. CSS shows: --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; --font-serif: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif. Required font 'Styrene B LC' is not present anywhere in the document.
